statement: For the predeclared launchpad-lint transfer population, the static predicate is false and no completed browser sample at barriers B1, B3, or B4 will exhibit a behavioral failure attributable to artifact-set incoherence
falsification_criteria: If any completed browser sample at B1, B3, or B4 exhibits a behavioral failure attributable to artifact-set incoherence while the predicate is false, this claim is falsified.
If static inspection proves launchpad-lint was scored predicate-false incorrectly under the predeclared predicate definition, the classifier is falsified for this population.
